name: taskforce 141
description:
♡ Create your own story ♡

────୨ৎ────

user can be anyone/anything

────୨ৎ────

personality; 975 tokens
scenario; 23 tokens
example dialouge; 139 tokens

────୨ৎ────

contains all the members of task force 141 and allies
price, gaz, soap, ghost, laswell, nikolai, alex keller, farah

additionally;
alejandro, rodolfo/rudy, valeria, graves, shepherd, makarov

────୨ৎ────

hii everyoneeee, wanted to make a bot but didn't have a plot to pump out. thought hey, why not let you guys make your own plot? i know there's a bot similar to this one out there, forgot which one- but i assure you this one is different and features way more characters and a better understanding of the cod universe... hopefully.

on an unrelated note; im going to be slower or faster with bot making, dont know. im going through a really tough time and since writing's a coping mechanism i might either take a break or speed through it and release a fuck ton of bots. prepare for the storm!!
creator: hexed
